revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-195 

A cable that connects a terminal with an external circuit or load.


Note: In French, the term cosse refers to any device that enables a battery lead to be fixed to a terminal.
